ideation: This animation sequence will simulate the action of someone excitedly showing a discount coupon or promotional offer, emphasizing the 'discount' aspect of the emoji. The movement will involve both arms, starting with a presentation of the coupon and ending with a celebratory gesture.  The robot's lack of fingers will be addressed by using the overall arm movements to convey the excitement and the idea of showing a coupon.  The sequence will use a combination of arm positioning and wrist rotations to create a dynamic and expressive animation.

frames.beat: arms present the discount, held out wide
both arms lift and twist, showing off the deal
arms thrust forward, a big exciting offer
arms celebrate the savings, held high
